data.title: SHIB at $0.00000584, RSI 49.33, MACD bearish. Consolidation seen, targeting $0.0000075-$0.0000085 by April 2026. (Read More)
data.description: The cryptocurrency SHIB is currently being traded at a price of $0.00000584, with the Relative Strength Index (RSI) indicating a neutral value of 49.33 and the Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD) showing a bearish momentum. Analysts have conducted a technical analysis on the market and have forecasted a consolidation phase. data.title: Aurora Mobile Issues Letter to Shareholders
data.description: A letter has been sent to shareholders by Mr. Weidong Luo, the Chairman and CEO of Aurora Mobile (NASDAQ: JG), headquartered in Shenzhen, China. The company is a prominent provider of customer engagement and marketing technology solutions. The communication was released on March 12, 2026.

data.title: CGI's IP-embedded decision engine Strata® Enterprise earns Arum Approved System certification
data.description: CGI, known by its stock market symbols GIB.A (TSX) and GIB (NYSE) and with its website at cgi.com/newsroom, has been acknowledged for its CGI Strata Enterprise software in the collections and recoveries domain. The certification establishes CGI Strata Enterprise as a key player in decision-making, employing AI and statistical models. This recognition was announced in Montréal on March 12, 2026. Additionally, CGI's stock is listed as TSX: GIB.A and NYSE: GIB.

data.title: Osage Advisors Advises MedCare Express on Its Sale to AMKY Health CT, LLC
data.description: A mergers and acquisitions advisory firm based in Centerbrook, Connecticut, called Osage Advisors, declared the successful sale of its client, MedCare Express, to AMKY Health CT, LLC, a private physician practice group on March 12, 2026. Osage Advisors took on the role of managing the transaction.

data.title: Chevron Hit With $1 Million Penalty Over Invalid Clean Fuel Credits
data.description: Chevron Corp. (NYSE: CVX) reached a settlement with the U.S. Department of Justice (DOJ) regarding alleged violations related to renewable fuel credits within the Renewable Fuel Standard program under the Clean Air Act. As per the terms, Chevron agreed to pay a civil penalty exceeding $1 million and retired more than 2 million renewable fuel credits worth around $3.6 million to address the violation. The settlement was a result of Chevron's admission in June 2023 of improperly generating over 2.2 million advanced biofuel production credits (Renewable Identification Numbers, or RINs) between January 2022 and August 2022. These credits originated from renewable diesel that had already been used for RIN generation and sold to third parties, raising concerns about double-counting in the RFS credit market. The DOJ highlighted the importance of maintaining the market's integrity by enforcing regulations that prohibit the duplicate generation of RINs from the same volume of renewable fuel. It also pointed out Chevron's role as both a renewable fuel producer and an obligated party within the program. For more details, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: Palantir’s Newest Customers Reveal the Secrets Behind Their Success at AIPCon 9
data.description: Palantir Technologies Inc. (PLTR) is set to hold its ninth AIPCon on Thursday, March 12th, 2026 in Miami. This event will showcase keynote speakers from leading sectors like defense, aerospace, energy, finance, and healthcare. Notable customers presenting at AIPCon 9 include U.S. Department of Navy, World View, Moder, SAP, Accenture, GE Aerospace, Joint Commission, Centrus Energy, CDAO, and more. Attendees can expect insights from these organizations on their use of Palantir's technologies.

data.title: Netradyne and Hyundai Translead Launch Strategic OEM Integration to Unify Fleet Safety with 360° Tractor-Trailer Visibility
data.description: Netradyne has revealed a partnership with Hyundai Translead to integrate their technology with the HT LinkVue trailer visibility system. This collaboration aims to enhance safety and efficiency in the transport industry. The integration brings together Netradyne's advanced solutions with Hyundai Translead's innovative system, creating a comprehensive and cutting-edge solution. This move is expected to significantly improve trailer visibility and overall operational performance.

data.title: Coats Releases 2025 Sustainability Report, Achieving Key 2026 Targets One Year Ahead of Schedule
data.description: In London, Coats Group plc, a prominent Tier 2 supplier in the apparel and footwear sectors, revealed its 2025 Sustainability Report, showcasing significant advancements across Energy, Materials, Water, Waste, and People - surpassing some 2026 goals ahead of schedule. David emphasized the company's commitment to sustainability, stating, "Coats is dedicated to influencing the future of the apparel and footwear industries."

data.title: AEON 2025 Yearly Recap: Building the Payment Infrastructure for the New AI Economy
data.description: In March 12, 2026, it was reported that in 2025, cryptocurrencies saw a surge in popularity, becoming more widely accepted. The clear regulations regarding ETFs and compliant distribution channels, along with the rise of publicly listed crypto-native companies, significantly reduced the barriers between the cryptocurrency market and the traditional economy. This shift marked a turning point in the integration of crypto assets, reflecting growing interest and investment in the sector.

data.title: Gogoro Announces US$16.7 Million New Equity Investment From Gold Sino
data.description: On March 12, 2026, Gogoro Inc., a leading technology company in sustainable mobility solutions, disclosed a recent development. The company has signed a Share Purchase Agreement with Gold Sino Assets Limited, its largest shareholder holding 31.4% of total outstanding shares. As per the agreement on March 11, 2026, Gold Sino committed to a New Equity Investment totaling around US$16.7 million. This investment marks the first equity infusion from Mr. Yin Chung Yao, a director at Gogoro and linked to Gold Sino. The agreement received approval from the Company’s audit committee and board of directors. Furthermore, this deal aligns with an earlier commitment Mr. Yin Chung Yao made to Gogoro’s lenders, led by Mega International Commercial Bank Co., Ltd., as announced on September 16, 2025.

data.title: Bimergen Energy to Present its $2B Growth Strategy at the LD Micro 16th Annual Invitational
data.description: Bimergen Energy Corporation, a company specializing in utility-scale and distributed battery energy storage systems (BESS) across the United States, revealed their participation in the LD Micro 16th Annual Invitational on May 17-19, 2026, at the Luxe Sunset Boulevard Hotel in Los Angeles, California. The company, listed on NYSE American under BESS and BESS.WS, is known for its development, ownership, and operation of these energy storage systems. This event serves as a platform for Bimergen Energy Corporation to showcase its initiatives in the renewable energy sector.

data.title: Bluejay Announces Abstract Accepted for Presentation at the 2026 Society of Academic Emergency Medicine (SAEM) Annual Meeting
data.description: Upcoming presentation of fresh clinical findings from the SYMON-I research study that analyzed the relationship between IL-6 levels and organ dysfunction in patients with sepsis. Key results from the study will be shared, shedding light on the impact of IL-6 levels in sepsis patients.

data.title: A.I.S. Resources Appoints VP Exploration, engages AI Metals
data.description: A.I.S. Resources Limited, based in Vancouver, British Columbia, disclosed on March 12, 2026, that Afzaal Pirzada has been chosen as the Vice President of Exploration. The Company has enlisted AI Metals Limited to conduct the integration and evaluation of geophysical and geological data at the Saint John Project. A.I.S. Resources Limited is listed as TSXV: AIS and OTC-Pink: AISSF.
